text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, isn't that—

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Ah! It's you again!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Knight... Wait, I guess you're actually
a time traveler? Oh, whatever! I'm so glad to see
you again, Miss Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it ain't the ace from Galaxy M76's Space
Federation!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Has Earth's fate been decided? Personally, I'd
rather you guys wait a bit longer before turning us
into space dust.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Fear not! Your desperate plea moved the
hearts of the council so much, they decided to
delay the demolition of Earth indefinitely!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! That's what I like to hear! Looks like I've
saved the world yet again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the little "princess" we once met in the park.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's endearing seeing how in sync the two of them
are.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's that you've got there?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just my notebook. You see...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
I like thinking about "what-ifs." Like, what if the
world was different? Or what if I was a different
kind of person? Things like that.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've only daydreamed alone... But
you inspired me to jump headfirst into brand new
worlds.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I've come up with so many more
ideas! And I've started writing them all down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her notebook is packed with exciting stories and
worlds that have me hooked just after a few lines.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm going to give shape to these ideas! I
don't know yet if it'll be a manga, or a movie, or a
book... but I'll find a way to share them with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh... You... you...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're sooo awesome! That's about the
awesome-est thing I've ever heard!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Once it's done, you'll be the first one I tell!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: So look forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heh. The sun's setting on another day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl runs off with a wave, and Gold Ship
watches her until she disappears into the
distance...
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see what she makes.
I can't wait to see what she makes.
Maybe we'll see her in the park again.
Now I want to make something too.
Now I want to make something too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl runs off with a wave, and Gold Ship
watches her until she disappears into the
distance...
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see what she makes.
I can't wait to see what she makes.
Maybe we'll see her in the park again.
Now I want to make something too.
Now I want to make something too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I feel you! Maybe we can have a cameo if
she makes a movie.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I bet we'd be a perfect fit for the characters she
wrote about on the first page.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's our origin story. She's the princess, I'm the
Golden Knight, and you're my pinky finger.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
She's on a quest to restore the decimated Argent
Kingdom to its former glory.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The journey is full of trials and tribulations, but
the pinky improves in leaps and bounds until it
can fire beams of light from both hands...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's with that pathetic look?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You gotta persevere until the awesome ending!
Bahaha!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Hate to say it, but that might be a bit
tough.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Why? Have you completely forgotten?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VZHWOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, something enormous appears, fills the
sky, and releases a blinding light!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man A
text_block_list.text: Good grief! We finally have you, Young Miss!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Man B
text_block_list.text:
It's time for you to study. Come now, let's return...
to our planet!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Fiiine... But you know... Hehe! I had a wonderful
time here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vwoosh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Off she goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and I watch as the speck disappears
into the twilit sky...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oho? What's this? Am I witnessing the birth of yet
another delightful writer?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Very well! Ahem! I, the great literary master
Golgol, shall lend you my ears.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Speak your ideas at will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As prompted, I use my imagination to spin a tale
on the spot.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Superb, absolutely superb! That was the very
definition of genius!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But it would be even more perfect if a torrent of
grape gummies fell from the sky at the very
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yes, then the forest should begin writhing as the
moon transforms into a regular
heptacontadihedron...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But all these anomalies are only the tip of the
iceberg!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not much is left of the story I envisioned by the
time Gold Ship is done with it, but we have a
fulfilling creative discussion nonetheless.
